tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Use of Want.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Use of Want का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I want water. I want to go home. He wants a new job. She wants to learn English. We want a big house.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Use of Want.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Use of Want का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: They want to finish this project. Do you want tea? I do not want this book. He wants to talk to me. I want some rest.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "क्या आप कॉफी चाहते हैं?"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "She want to learn English."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Use of Want.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Use of Want का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We want more information. I want your help. They want peace. I want to finish this work quickly.
